message:
fix(widgets/validation_error,decision_card,drift): clear separator cells + tidy last NoStyling paths

Three small cleanups:

crates/ftui-widgets/src/validation_error.rs

- StatefulWidget::render: the separator space between the icon
  and the message was advanced with a bare
  `x = x.saturating_add(1);` which skipped the cell at the old
  x position without clearing whatever was there.  If the frame
  had a sentinel char at that position from a prior render, it
  would leak through as a visible glyph between the icon and
  the message.
- Replace with
  `x = draw_text_span(frame, x, y, " ", Style::default(), max_x);`
  so the separator cell is explicitly overwritten with a space.
- New test render_clears_separator_cell pre-seeds the target
  buffer cell with 'X', runs the widget render, and asserts the
  cell is ' ' afterwards.

crates/ftui-widgets/src/decision_card.rs
crates/ftui-widgets/src/drift_visualization.rs

- Trailing NoStyling cleanup for paths missed by the earlier
  "extend NoStyling/Skeleton degradation to decision_card,
  drift_visualization" commit: the summary-row background fill
  in decision_card and the chart axis label color in
  drift_visualization.  Both now consult apply_styling() and
  fall back to Style::default() instead of reading self.*_style
  directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
